title: RSB19_quiescent mouse HSC
source_name_ch1: quiescent mouse HSC
treatment_protocol_ch1: Biliary liver fibrosis was induced in eight-week-old mice subjected to ligation of the common bile duct and mice were sacrificed 14 days after. Cholestatic liver fibrosis was induced in mice treated with diet containing 0.1% 3,5-diethoxycarbonyl-1,4-dihydrocollidine (DDC) for three weeks. CCA was induced by co-injection of YAP/AKT/SB13 or KRAS/sg-p19/SB13 plasmids hydrodinamic tail vein injection and mice were sacrificed 6weeks after.
extract_protocol_ch1: HSC,CAF and whole tumor specipments were obtained perfusing and digesting the liver, followed by FACS sorting.
extract_protocol_ch1.1: BULK RNA Seq: Constructed libraries using Illumina TruSeq RNA Preparation Kit according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
extract_protocol_ch1.2: scRNA-seq: Single-cell RNA-seq libraries were prepared using the Chromium Single Cell 3′ v2 (RS013) and v3 (RS030, AJ064) Reagent Kit (10x Genomics) according to manufacturer’s instructions, 12 cycles of cDNA amplification and 12 cycles of library amplification were performed, and samples were sequenced on an Illumina NovaSeq 6000 at the JP Sulzberger Columbia Genome Center.
data_processing.1: 20M paired-end 100bp sequencing was performed using the Illumina NovaSeq 6000
data_processing.2: RTA (Illumina) was used for base calling and bcl2fastq2 (version 2.19) for converting BCL to fastq format, coupled with adaptor trimming.
data_processing.3: A pseudoalignment to a kallisto index was created from transcriptomes (Human: GRCh38; Mouse: GRCm38) using kallisto (0.44.0).
data_processing.4: Differentially expressed genes were tested using DESeq2. Normalization was done internally using DESeq2's specialized algorithm and normalization to compare across samples, was performed using the TPM (transcripts per million) method
data_processing.6: 10x genomics' cellranger pipeline was used to process the data (RS013 v2.1.1; RS030 and AJ064 v3.1.0).
data_processing.7: BCL files were demultiplexed with 10x Cell Ranger's mkfastq command and analysis and alignment were performed using Cell Ranger's count command with Cell Ranger's reference mm10 (mouse) or hg38 (human).
data_processing.9: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: text files includeTPM values for each Sample; raw counts in MatrixMarket (mtx) format
